meaning of navni

The name "Navni" is of Indian origin and is predominantly used for girls. It is derived from the combination of two Sanskrit words: "nav" meaning "nine" and "ni" meaning "becoming" or "transforming into." Therefore, the name "Navni" can be interpreted as "one who transforms into nine," often symbolizing a manifestation of the divine feminine energy or representing the nine forms of the Hindu goddess Durga.
suggest me a new name in french for my cosmetic brand

Certainly! Here's a French name suggestion for your cosmetic brand:

Éclaté Belleza (meaning "Radiant Beauty" in French)
